result.stdout:
apply-macros | am	This will update buildup-scripts for their macros in your project.
	extract-scripts | es	Connects to the target project's database, reads the meadow history (if any) and re creates the buildup scripts in scripts-directory.

commands.payload:
apply-macros | am	This will update buildup-scripts for their macros in your project.
	extract-scripts | es	Connects to the target project's database, reads the meadow history (if any) and re creates the buildup scripts in scripts-directory.
